_note: Static, ITR-verified F&O figures. INR. Net = Gross - Charges. Update manually from broker statements / ITR. CF figures reconciled to the 3-year tax model (Shyam_Pradhan_3yr_tax_model).

carryforward.label: STCG loss
carryforward.sub: ₹4,700 BF loss fully used vs FY25-26 STCG — nil carried

carryforward.label: CF entering FY26-27
carryforward.sub: Non-spec + speculative; STCG consumed in FY25-26

cf.stcgNote: ₹4,700 brought-forward STCG loss was fully consumed against FY25-26 short-term gains — nil carried into FY26-27.
cf.equityBlock: The ₹5.97L F&O + speculative loss pool can only offset future F&O / intraday profit — never capital gains. New gains here are taxed in full.

cfNote: FY25-26 F&O resulted in a net loss (−₹12,619) — set off in-year vs STCG/OS (s71), so it was NOT added to the pool. The ₹5,97,318 pool (non-spec ₹5,13,011 + speculative ₹84,307) enters FY26-27 intact; the ₹4,700 STCG loss was consumed against FY25-26 short-term gains. FY26-27 YTD realised F&O (+₹98,012) is absorbing the non-spec CF first (oldest AY2024-25 tranche). Speculative CF absorbs only intraday profit — not credit spread or stock F&O income.
